images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a striking 20‑year‑old Japanese idol‑style model with flawless, naturally textured skin, luminous large eyes and silky straight black hair, caught mid‑laugh while balancing a small tray of freshly baked cupcakes on a sleek dryer in a bright laundromat. She wears a form‑fitting modern cheongsam in deep satin‑red silk, its high slit revealing a glimpse of toned thigh, while the tailored cut hugs her slim waist and emphasizes her curvy silhouette; thin spaghetti straps and subtle lace trim add a tasteful tease. A hard flash floods the scene with crisp, studio‑bright light, erasing shadows and bathing everything in a rich monochrome red tone. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85 mm f/1.4 GM lens, with razor‑sharp focus, shallow depth of field, ray‑traced lighting and global illumination for a hyper‑real, cinematic finish.8k photo, Large breasts
